---
title: "Assignment 3"
---

## Question 2

Write SQL codes to get a list of:

**i. Student IDs, Instructors, and Departments**

``` sql
SELECT 
    s.ID AS student_id,
    s.name AS student_name,
    i.name AS instructor_name,
    s.dept_name AS department
FROM student s
JOIN takes t ON s.ID = t.ID
JOIN teaches te ON t.course_id = te.course_id
               AND t.sec_id = te.sec_id
               AND t.semester = te.semester
               AND t.year = te.year
JOIN instructor i ON te.ID = i.ID
ORDER BY s.ID;
```

## Question 3

Write SQL codes to do the following queries:

**i. Find the ID and name of each student who has taken at least one Comp. Sci. course (no duplicates)**

``` sql
SELECT DISTINCT s.ID, s.name
FROM student s
JOIN takes t ON s.ID = t.ID
JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.course_id
WHERE c.dept_name = 'Comp. Sci.';
```

**ii. Add grades to the list**

``` sql
SELECT DISTINCT s.ID, s.name, t.grade
FROM student s
JOIN takes t ON s.ID = t.ID
JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.course_id
WHERE c.dept_name = 'Comp. Sci.';
```

**iii. Find students who have not taken any course offered before 2017**

``` sql
SELECT s.ID, s.name
FROM student s
WHERE s.ID NOT IN (
    SELECT t.ID
    FROM takes t
    WHERE t.year < 2017
);
```

**iv. For each department, find the maximum salary of instructors**

``` sql
SELECT dept_name, MAX(salary) AS max_salary
FROM instructor
GROUP BY dept_name;
```

**v. Find the lowest of the per-department maximum salaries**

``` sql
SELECT MIN(max_salary) AS lowest_max_salary
FROM (
    SELECT dept_name, MAX(salary) AS max_salary
    FROM instructor
    GROUP BY dept_name
) AS dept_max;
```

**vi. Add names to the list**

``` sql
SELECT i.name, i.dept_name, i.salary
FROM instructor i
WHERE i.salary = (
    SELECT MIN(max_salary)
    FROM (
        SELECT MAX(salary) AS max_salary
        FROM instructor
        GROUP BY dept_name
    ) AS dept_max
);
```

## Question 4

Find instructors (with name and ID) who have never given an A grade

``` sql
SELECT i.ID, i.name
FROM instructor i
WHERE i.ID NOT IN (
    SELECT te.ID
    FROM teaches te
    JOIN takes ta ON te.course_id = ta.course_id
                 AND te.sec_id    = ta.sec_id
                 AND te.semester  = ta.semester
                 AND te.year      = ta.year
    WHERE ta.grade = 'A'
);
```

## Question 5

Find the number of students in each section

``` sql
SELECT
    course_id  AS courseid,
    sec_id     AS secid,
    year,
    semester,
    COUNT(ID)  AS num
FROM takes
GROUP BY course_id, sec_id, year, semester
ORDER BY course_id, sec_id, year, semester;
```
